hero.title: Redesign Your Website for
hero.description: Transform your outdated website into a fast, search-optimized, and customer-focused digital experience that actually drives business outcomes.

challenges.title: A Website Should Be More Than
challenges.description: Outdated web designs, slow load times, confusing navigation, and poor mobile responsiveness cause businesses to lose leads and organic rankings.
challenges.secondaryDescription: At Fillip Technologies, we rebuild websites from the ground up, focusing on speed, search rankings, user experience, and conversion optimization.

items.title: High Bounce Rates
items.description: Slow pages, confusing navigation, and outdated designs frustrate visitors, causing them to leave instantly.

items.title: Loss of Search Rankings
items.description: Legacy web architectures and lack of mobile optimization degrade your Google search visibility.

items.title: Outdated Branding
items.description: A website built years ago fails to reflect your current business scope, success, and professional caliber.

items.title: Rigid Content Editing
items.description: Marketing teams struggle to make routine page updates because the backend is complex and code-heavy.

whatWeBuild.title: Rebuilt and Optimized for
whatWeBuild.description: We don't just reskin websites; we rebuild them with modern code, layouts, and conversion triggers.

cards.title: Brand Identity Makeover
cards.description: Complete visual update with modern typography, colors, animations, and clean layouts that reflect your true business stature.

cards.title: Page Performance Overhaul
cards.description: Replacing heavy legacy code with next-generation Next.js or React builds to deliver instant page loads.

cards.title: Mobile-First UX
cards.description: Optimizing every viewport, touch target, and menu for seamless smartphone and tablet usability.

cards.title: SEO-Preserving Migration
cards.description: Structuring redirects and metadata mappings correctly so you keep 100% of your existing search engine authority.

technologyStack.title: Built With Cleaner
technologyStack.description: We replace slow, legacy systems with clean, modern, and light structures for maximum performance.
technologyStack.whyDescription: Upgrading code architectures improves core web vitals, which directly boosts search rankings and lowers user bounce rates.

frontend.title: Next-Gen Frontend
frontend.description: Lightning-fast static and dynamic web layouts built with React and Tailwind CSS.

backend.title: Backend & API Integration
backend.description: Optimized server scripts and clean API endpoints for fast dynamic rendering.

cms.title: Flexible Content Control
cms.description: Visual editors or headless content management systems for simple, rapid editing.

cloud.title: Global Deployment
cloud.description: CDN-backed, global edge servers for absolute uptime and zero latency.

process.title: Our Redesign
process.description: We carefully audit your site structure, content, and traffic before writing code, ensuring your search rankings are fully preserved.

outcomes.title: Results of a Clean
outcomes.description: Upgrading your website delivers instant performance, trust, and organic search ranking boosts.
